name: mule-tlf-com-test-design-center
description: RAML Design Center lab project for Release Flow Guardian.

scripts.validate: npm run deps:check && npm run validate:config && npm run validate:release && npm run validate:raml && npm run contract:extract && npm run contract:guard
scripts.guardian:preflight: npm run validate && npm run package:exchange && npm run report:html
scripts.ci:publish: npm run validate && npm run stability:resolve && npm run package:exchange && npm run publish:exchange && npm run report:html
